COMMON.APP_NAME: SRIMS - Ski Rental & Inventory Management System

COMMON.PASSWORD_PATTERN: Password must contain at least one number, and one special character.

COMMON.DATE_OF_BIRTH_FUTURE: Date of birth cannot be in the future!

EQUIPMENT_CREATE.PRICE_MIN: The price must be greater than 0.

STATISTICS.TITLE: Statistics

MESSAGES.NO_DATA: No data available for the selected period. Adjust the filters and click 'Generate'.
MESSAGES.ERROR: Statistics could not be loaded. Please check your inputs.

OVERVIEW.TITLE: Graphical Overview

BARCODE_SCANNER.TITLE: Prototype Barcode Scanner
BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_NOT_FOUND: Equipment with barcode ID "{{value}}" was not found.
BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_ACTION_NOT_ALLOWED: Action not allowed in this mode. Item is currently in status {{status}}.
BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_CAMERA: An error occurred while checking for a camera.
BARCODE_SCANNER.NO_CAMERA_FOUND: No camera found. Please make sure that a camera is connected and functioning properly.
BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_ALREADY_SCANNED: {{model}} has already been scanned in this session.
BARCODE_SCANNER.NO_EQUIPMENT_SCANNED: No equipment scanned yet. Please scan a barcode.
BARCODE_SCANNER.SUCCESS_ADDED: {{model}} has been added to the list.
BARCODE_SCANNER.SUCCESS_REMOVED: {{model}} has been removed from the list.
BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_NO_RESERVATION_TODAY: No active reservation found for {{model}} for today.
BARCODE_SCANNER.SCENARIO_CONFLICT_WARN: WARNING: Items from multiple different reservations have been scanned!
BARCODE_SCANNER.SCENARIO_SOME_RESERVED_WARN: NOTICE: Not all associated items for this reservation have been scanned yet.
BARCODE_SCANNER.SCENARIO_UNRESERVED_WARN: WARNING: Items have been scanned that do not belong to any of the active reservations!
BARCODE_SCANNER.SUCCESS_PROCESS_COMPLETED: Process successfully recorded in the system!
BARCODE_SCANNER.MODAL_QUESTION: Do you want to complete the scan process for {{name}} now?
BARCODE_SCANNER.MODAL_SUBTEXT: The status changes of the equipment will be recorded directly in the system.
BARCODE_SCANNER.WALK_IN_SUBTITLE: No existing reservation was found for this equipment today. You can assign the gear directly to a customer profile here.
BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_INVALID_RETURN_DATE: The return date cannot be before today's pickup date!
BARCODE_SCANNER.WALK_IN_CONFIRM_PROMPT: Are you sure you want to create this direct walk-in rental?
BARCODE_SCANNER.WALK_IN_INFO_TEXT: Note: A new Reservation with the items chosen below will be created during this check-out.

RESERVATION.NO_EQUIPMENT_SELECTED: No equipment selected yet. Use the buttons below to add gear.
RESERVATION.VALIDATION_WARNING: Some previously selected items have been removed because they are not available in the newly selected period.
RESERVATION.DELETE_CONFIRMATION: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
RESERVATION.LOADING_FAILED: The reservation details could not be loaded.
RESERVATION.NOT_FOUND: The requested reservation was not found.
RESERVATION.NO_RESERVATIONS_FOUND: No active reservations found for the scanned items today.
RESERVATION.CONFIRM_PROMPT: Are you sure you want to submit this reservation?
RESERVATION.CONFIRM_SUBTEXT: Please double-check all selected equipment items and dates before proceeding.
